exchanges.bot: ¿Quiere un corte de pelo o un peinado?
exchanges.expected: Quiero un corte de pelo corto, por favor.
exchanges.hint: I want a short haircut, please.

exchanges.expected: Tengo cita a las cuatro de la tarde.
exchanges.hint: I have an appointment at four in the afternoon.

exchanges.expected: Quiero el flequillo recto, por favor.
Sí, quiero lavado y secado, por favor.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I want wash and dry, please.

exchanges.expected: Sí, uso crema para el pelo rizado.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I use cream for curly hair.
The haircut costs twenty dollars, right?

exchanges.expected: No, solo quiero un corte hoy.
exchanges.hint: No, I just want a haircut today.

exchanges.expected: Sí, me encanta cómo quedó mi pelo.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I love how my hair turned out.
